title: Carry out paint-less dent repairs on vehicle body panels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out paint-less dent repairs on vehicle body panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to carry out PDR repairs

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and PDR tool manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability 1.5 Plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and PDR tool manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability 1.5 Plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret workplace procedures and PDR tool manufacturer specifications1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability 1.5 Plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to carry out PDR repairs

elements.title: Repair panel using PDR process

pcs.text: Prepare vehicle panels and work area for PDR work2.2 Fabricate and modify PDR tools to suit work requirements2.3 Repair components using required PDR methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.4 Obtain advice from authorised personnel if repair interferes with vehicle trim or electrical systems 2.5 Finish painted surface according to workplace procedures, and check PDR repairs against workplace instructions and workplace quality standards and finish requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare vehicle panels and work area for PDR work2.2 Fabricate and modify PDR tools to suit work requirements2.3 Repair components using required PDR methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.4 Obtain advice from authorised personnel if repair interferes with vehicle trim or electrical systems 2.5 Finish painted surface according to workplace procedures, and check PDR repairs against workplace instructions and workplace quality standards and finish requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare vehicle panels and work area for PDR work2.2 Fabricate and modify PDR tools to suit work requirements2.3 Repair components using required PDR methods and equipment according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.4 Obtain advice from authorised personnel if repair interferes with vehicle trim or electrical systems 2.5 Finish painted surface according to workplace procedures, and check PDR repairs against workplace instructions and workplace quality standards and finish requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Repair panel using PDR process

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
